rows.notes: Chosen based on consensus for header type and no amounts. Gemini-flash's description 'Soluta Varia.' is a more accurate transcription of capitalization and punctuation observed in the image.

Description 'Thompsons Bill' (without apostrophe) from gemini-flash is visually more accurate. Pounds value '14' is clearly visible in the image, overriding gpt-5-mini's interpretation of '13' based on an arithmetic check. Shillings and pence are consistent across extractors and clear visually.
rows.english_description: Payment of a bill to Thompson for supplies or services.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment of a bill to Thompson amounting to £14 5s 9d.

rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment of a bill to Boylys amounting to £1 8s 0d.
